original_statement: did the belgian team win or lose the game on july 29?
mutated_statement: did the team do something or not in something on july 29?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action vagueness + Object generalization + Negation framing change: "the belgian team" → "the team" (nationality removed) | "win or lose" → "do something or not" (specific competitive outcome → vague action + negation) | "the game" → "something" (match → indefinite placeholder) (july 29 → july 29)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和critique中可见代理明显意识到问题模糊：judge_thought写道“ The question is too vague... the unspecified ‘something’ makes the query unanswerable... responding 'cannot be determined' is appropriate”，critique指出第3步“将模糊的‘do something’错误解读为‘win or not’是无根据的”。代理的具体表现是先在iteration0基于假设给出具体答案“No”，随后在refine阶段通过f_select_row过滤日期并明确说明“问题模糊且无法得出是/否结论”，返回“Cannot be determined”。因此归类为第二类：意识到模糊性并拒绝盲目猜测，表明需要更明确信息或无法在现有信息下回答。
